must_have_quals: Must have experience in Go, Have 4+ years of engineering experience, Have contributed to the development of backend systems, Experience in payment processing systems, Take a rigorous approach to testing backed development, Experience with AWS or other cloud platforms, Have an understanding of architectural patterns of large, mission-critical production services, Have worked in continuous integration/deployment environments
preferred_quals: Experience in additional backend languages such as Ruby, Java and Python is preferred
core_responsibilities: Design, develop, test, and deploy components of a new financial platform, Deliver secure, reliable, and high-performance infrastructure and APIs, Work with our infrastructure engineering team to minimize the operational overhead of production systems you deploy, Develop thoroughly tested code and conduct quality assurance on all new code alongside our QA team, Learn and execute on agile methodologies, follow test driven development approach, Engineers are required to participate in on-call rotation. Being on call may include responding to incidents outside of regular working hours when necessary
job_summary: Chime is a financial technology company dedicated to helping individuals achieve financial progress. They are looking for a Software Engineer to develop a reliable and scalable financial platform that supports essential activities for millions of members, ensuring high performance and security.
